modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Service not sending emails from Student Manager application

full_description_text:  
The user is experiencing an issue where emails are not being sent from the Student Manager. They mentioned encountering an "unable to relay" error when trying to send messages. This seems to be related to the email routing setup on smtp.usd.edu and hybrid.usd.edu. The user is looking for a way to confirm if the service is functioning properly.
